name: Scroll of Identification
description: Reveals the true nature of one unknown potion or scroll in your pack.

name: Scroll of Teleportation
description: Whisks you to a random walkable tile on the floor. A lifesaver in a pinch.

name: Scroll of Amnesia
description: Lets you forget one memorised spell, freeing its slot for new learning.

name: Scroll of Blinking
description: Teleports you to a chosen walkable tile in line of sight.

name: Scroll of Butterflies
description: Summons a swarm of friendly butterflies that push other creatures away.

name: Scroll of Enchant Armour
description: Adds +1 to the enchantment of a chosen non-artefact armour piece or shield.

name: Scroll of Enchant Weapon
description: Adds +1 to the enchantment of a chosen non-artefact weapon.

name: Scroll of Fear
description: Attempts to cause fear in all visible enemies, sending them fleeing.

name: Scroll of Fog
description: Releases a spreading cloud of fog that blocks line of sight.

name: Scroll of Immolation
description: Sets the inner flame alight in all visible creatures. They detonate on death.

name: Scroll of Noise
description: Makes a loud noise that awakens every monster on the floor.

name: Scroll of Poison
description: Fills every unoccupied tile in your line of sight with a poisonous cloud.

name: Scroll of Revelation
description: Reveals the entire floor's layout and grants a brief glimpse through walls.

name: Scroll of Silence
description: Cloaks the area in a silence aura, blocking spellcasting and scroll-reading.

name: Scroll of Summoning
description: Summons a small host of creatures from the floor's native fauna.

name: Scroll of Torment
description: Torments all visible creatures - friend and foe alike - bypassing armour.

name: Scroll of Vulnerability
description: Halves the willpower of all visible creatures, making them easier to afflict.

name: Scroll of Brand Weapon
description: Applies a random magical brand to a chosen non-artefact weapon.

name: Scroll of Acquirement
description: Offers a choice of three items tailored to your skills, or a pile of gold.
